summary: Plan-only inventory classification for five PRs. No merge candidate has complete merge preflight proof. One closed PR is kept closed, one open PR needs bounded branch repair before any merge recommendation, and three open PRs need maintainer judgment because the artifact shows broad scope, waiting-on-author state, or unresolved review/comment proof.

actions.reason: Broad code delta is explicitly require_human_for in the job, and merge cannot be recommended without resolved comment and Codex /review proof.
The PR is marked waiting on author and has failing checks. Because active author follow-up is require_human_for, do not recommend merge or autonomous repair from this plan shard.
Do not merge while checks fail and bot-review proof is incomplete. The branch is maintainer-editable and scoped enough for a targeted repair pass before a future merge preflight.
Already closed refs must not receive closure or merge actions in this plan.
The PR is marked waiting on author and has unresolved bot-review/comment proof, so merge or repair needs maintainer direction before any finalization path.
